revision.text:
[[ja:御霊神社 (有田川町)]] {{Infobox religious building| | Name = Goryō Shrine | File = [[File:Goryo-jinja, Aridagawa.jpg|300px]] | location = {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|qid=Q131314|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|en|Arida District, Wakayama|qid=Q1131181|lt=Arida District|1=Arida District, Wakayama}}, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|en|Aridagawa, Wakayama|qid=Q1345889|lt=Aridagawa|1=Aridagawa, Wakayama}}, 32 Shō | coordinates = {{Coord|34.064389|N|135.240972|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | Enshrined Deities = {{ill|Kibi no Makibi|en|Kibi no Makibi|qid=Q1063276|lt=Kibi no Makibi|1=Kibi no Makibi}}
{{ill|Prince Sawara|en|Prince Sawara|qid=Q1079634|lt=Prince Sawara|1=Prince Sawara}} (Emperor Sudō)
{{ill|Prince Iyo|ja|伊予親王|1=Iyo Shinnō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Iyo|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyo Shinnō|qq=}}
{{ill|Fujiwara no Fujin|ja|藤原夫人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Fujin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Fuji no Tayu|ja|藤太夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuji no Tayu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Tachibana no Hayanari|en|Tachibana no Hayanari|qid=Q1062686|lt=Tachibana no Hayanari|1=Tachibana no Hayanari}} (Tachibana no Tayu)
{{ill|Bun no Tayu|ja|文太夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bun no Tayu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q382005}} (Karai Tenjin) | Main Hall = Wooden, tile-roofed {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684|lt=nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} style | image = File:Goryo-jinja, Aridagawa.jpg | location = {{ill|Aridagawa|qid=Q1345889|1=Aridagawa, Wakayama}} | deity = {{ill|Kibi no Makibi|qid=Q1063276|1=Kibi no Makibi}} }} '''Goryō Shrine''' (御霊神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|en|Aridagawa, Wakayama|qid=Q1345889|lt=Aridagawa|1=Aridagawa, Wakayama}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|en|Arida District, Wakayama|qid=Q1131181|lt=Arida District|1=Arida District, Wakayama}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|qid=Q131314|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == The principal deities enshrined at Goryō Shrine are: * {{ill|Kibi no Makibi|en|Kibi no Makibi|qid=Q1063276|lt=Kibi no Makibi|1=Kibi no Makibi}} (Kibi Daijin) * {{ill|Prince Sawara|en|Prince Sawara|qid=Q1079634|lt=Prince Sawara|1=Prince Sawara}} (Emperor Sudō) * {{ill|Prince Iyo|ja|伊予親王|1=Iyo Shinnō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Iyo|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyo Shinnō|qq=}} * {{ill|Fujiwara no Fujin|ja|藤原夫人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Fujin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Fuji no Tayu|ja|藤太夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuji no Tayu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tachibana no Hayanari|en|Tachibana no Hayanari|qid=Q1062686|lt=Tachibana no Hayanari|1=Tachibana no Hayanari}} (Tachibana no Tayu) * {{ill|Bun no Tayu|ja|文太夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bun no Tayu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q382005}} (Karai Tenjin) == References == * [http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=5014 Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Association - Goryō Shrine (御霊神社)] == Related Pages == * {{ill|List of Shinto shrines in Japan|en|List of Shinto shrines in Japan|qid=Q2517815|lt=List of Shinto shrines|1=List of Shinto shrines in Japan}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} }} {{translated page|ja|御霊神社 (有田川町)|version=100427080|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[ja:御霊神社 (有田川町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11489360}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Aritagawa Town]] [[Category:Municipal History of Aritagawa]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
